items.title: US attorney general criticised after saying all Epstein files have been released
items.description: Lawmakers, including those who wrote the law requiring their publication, argue the release is insufficient.

items.title: FBI analysing recovered glove that appears to match those worn in Guthrie suspect video
items.description: The FBI says it recovered a DNA sample from the glove, which was found in a field a few miles from Guthrie's home.

items.title: What is the dart frog toxin allegedly used to kill Alexei Navalny?
items.description: The toxin, epibatidine, can be found in frogs in the wild in South America or manufactured in a lab.

items.title: US boards second tanker in Indian Ocean after tracking it from Caribbean
items.description: The US accuses the Veronica III of violating a "quarantine" on oil shipments from Venezuela.

items.title: Eleven killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza, rescuers say
items.description: The Palestinian Red Crescent say a strike on a tent encampment in northern Gaza killed at least six people.
